phrases.intent_en: Is visa on arrival payment cash only?
phrases.text_local: Kapıda vize ödemesi sadece nakit mi?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment methods can change, and the venue context does not specify if cash is the only option, so directing to an official desk is safest.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the baggage wrap service?
phrases.cultural_note: The exact counter location for baggage wrapping is not specified among the stable targets, so the safest response is to consult the information desk.

likely_response.translation_en: On the arrivals floor, on the right.

responses.english: On the arrivals floor, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the taxi fixed-rate booth?
phrases.cultural_note: The exact location of the fixed-rate booth within the terminal is not specified, so staff may direct you to the general information point.

likely_response.translation_en: Just to the right of the exit door.

responses.english: Just to the right of the exit door.

phrases.text_local: İç hat uçuşları için hangi terminal?
phrases.cultural_note: The domestic terminal is a stable, named target in the venue context, so it can be stated directly.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I top up my AntRay card?
phrases.cultural_note: The specific location of a top-up machine inside the airport is not listed in the venue context, so the safe advice is to ask at an information point.

likely_response.translation_en: At the exit, on the left side.

responses.english: At the exit, on the left side.
